data.name: Dominated by: Nerdy Childhood Friend
data.detailed_description:
1 Year after moving into the dorms at your new university, you're about to spend Christmas alone until your sadistic childhood friend barges in against your will and decides to sadistically bully you for her own pleasure and entertainment. Will you be able to endure her cruel torment?

Yuka-sensei makes a cameo at the end of the story

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • Approximately 8K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 15 Character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's in the game

  • Kinetic Novel

  • All characters are over 21 years of age

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
